title: Random Item Challenge VS Juggernaut
description: One team gets random items and must finish the game, but the other team must kill them. The juggernauts have diamond gear.
body:
## The Random Item Challenge VS Juggernaut Manhunt

This is a Random Item Challenge VS Juggernaut plugin for 1.19+

It is basically a manhunt where survivors gain random items like in the [Random Item Challenge](https://modrinth.com/plugin/random-item-challenge)

The idea of this game came from [MrPlink](https://youtube.com/@Plinkbutnot).

The default config provides 100+ item possibilities and a default kit for juggernauts.


## How to use

- Stop your server if it is already running
- Download this plugin and put it in the plugins folder of your server
- Start your server
- To start a game, use the `/ricvsjuggernaut` command (before doing `/ricvsjuggernaut start` you must choose survivors and juggernauts with `/ricvsjuggernauts <survivors/juggernauts> add [players]`

You can edit the config in the plugin folder.

By default you have 100+ items possibilities for survivors and diamond gear for juggernauts.


## Upcoming features

This plugin might evolve into a universal manhunt plugin with many possible scenarios including this one

Don't hesitate to suggest more features !


## Permissions
- `randomitemchallengevsjuggernaut.admin` => Permission for the `/ricvsjuggernaut` command (to manage the game)
